children.text: Introduction (Where & When)
children.cn: 介绍（时间与地点）

children.text: Last summer vacation, I went somewhere fantastic with my family.
children.cn: 去年暑假，我和家人去了一个极好的地方。
children.notes: last summer vacation: 去年暑假; somewhere fantastic: 极好的地方
children.statement: 作者去年暑假是和朋友一起去旅行的。
children.explanation: 句子中提到是和家人（with my family）去旅行的，而不是朋友。

children.text: We visited an ancient town in Yunnan.
children.cn: 我们参观了云南的一座古老小镇。
children.notes: visited: 参观（visit的过去式）; ancient town: 古老小镇
children.statement: “visited” 是规则动词的过去式，其原形是 “visit”。
children.explanation: visit 的过去式是在词尾直接加 -ed，属于规则变化。

children.text: Activities & Scenery
children.cn: 活动与风景

children.text: During the vacation, we stayed in a comfortable hotel.
children.cn: 度假期间，我们住在一间舒适的旅馆里。
children.notes: During: 在……期间; stayed in: 住在（stay in的过去式）; comfortable: 舒适的
children.explanation: “comfortable” 意为“舒适的，舒服的”。它的反义词是 “uncomfortable”。

children.text: The scenery there was beautiful, especially the blue sky.
children.cn: 那里的风景很美，尤其是蓝天。
children.notes: scenery: 风景; beautiful: 美丽的; especially: 尤其是，特别地
children.statement: “scenery” 是一个可数名词，可以用复数形式。
children.explanation: “scenery” 是不可数名词，表示总体的风景，没有复数形式。

children.text: We took a local guide to show us around.
children.cn: 我们找了一个当地导游带我们四处游览。
children.notes: local guide: 当地导游; show sb. around: 带某人四处参观
children.statement: “show us around” 意为“带我们四处参观/游览”。
children.explanation: show sb. around 是固定搭配，意为带领某人参观和熟悉周围的环境。

children.text: We saw thousands of old buildings and bought some artworks.
children.cn: 我们看到了成千上万的古老建筑，并买了一些艺术品。
children.notes: thousands of: 成千上万的; old buildings: 古老建筑; artworks: 艺术品
children.statement: “thousands of” 意为“成千上万的”，后面接复数名词。
children.explanation: thousands of 表示概数，表示“成千上万的”，后面必须接可数名词的复数形式（如 buildings）。
children.keywords: thousands of, old buildings, bought, artworks

children.text: Feelings & Meaning
children.cn: 感受与意义

children.text: I did not feel bored at all.
children.cn: 我一点也不觉得无聊。
children.notes: feel bored: 感到无聊; not... at all: 一点也不，完全不
children.statement: “bored” 意为“令人无聊的”，通常用来修饰事物。
children.explanation: “bored” 意为“感到无聊的”，通常修饰人（主语是人）；“boring” 意为“令人无聊的”，通常修饰事物。
children.keywords: did not, feel bored, at all

children.text: This trip reminded me of the importance of protecting old towns.
children.cn: 这次旅行提醒了我保护古镇的重要性。
children.notes: reminded: 提醒，使想起（remind的过去式）; remind sb. of: 提醒某人某事; importance: 重要性; protecting: 保护
children.statement: “remind sb. of sth.” 意为“提醒某人某事”或“使某人想起某事”。
children.explanation: remind sb. of sth. 是固定搭配，表示“使某人想起某事”或“提醒某人注意某事”。

children.text: I will never forget this wonderful experience.
children.cn: 我永远不会忘记这次美妙的经历。
children.notes: never: 从不，决不; forget: 忘记; wonderful experience: 美妙的经历
children.explanation: 当 “experience” 表示具体的一次“经历”或“体验”时，它是可数名词；当表示抽象的“经验”时，它是不可数名词。此处表示一次经历，是可数名词。

tree.text: A Journey to the Ancient Town

children.text: Introduction (Where & When)
children.cn: 介绍（时间与地点）

children.text: During my last summer vacation, I traveled somewhere fantastic with my family to relax ourselves.
children.cn: 在我的上个暑假期间，我和家人去了一个极好的地方旅行以放松我们自己。
children.notes: During: 在……期间; traveled: 旅行（travel的过去式）; to relax ourselves: 动词不定式作目的状语，意为“放松我们自己”
children.statement: 句中的 “to relax ourselves” 在句中作目的状语。
children.explanation: 动词不定式 to relax ourselves 表目的，说明旅行的目的是为了放松自己。

children.text: We visited an ancient town, which was famous for its history and beautiful landscape.
children.cn: 我们参观了一个因其历史和美丽风景而闻名的古镇。
children.notes: which...: 关系代词which引导的非限制性定语从句，修饰 ancient town; be famous for: 因……而闻名; landscape: 风景，景色
children.statement: 句子中的 “which” 可以用 “that” 替换。
children.explanation: 在非限制性定语从句中（有逗号隔开），只能用 which，不能用 that 引导。
children.keywords: visited, ancient town, which, famous for, landscape

children.text: Activities & Scenery
children.cn: 活动与风景

children.text: The local scenery was so beautiful that it easily took my breath away, especially when a colorful rainbow appeared in the blue sky.
children.cn: 当地的风景如此之美，以至于很容易就让我叹为观止，尤其是当彩虹出现在蓝天中时。
children.notes: so... that...: 如此……以至于……; took one's breath away: 令人叹为观止，美得令人无法呼吸; especially when: 尤其是当……时
children.statement: “took my breath away” 的字面意思是“拿走了我的呼吸”，实际是用来形容风景绝美，令人赞叹。
children.explanation: take one's breath away 是一个常用成语，意思是“使人惊叹”或“美得令人窒息”。
children.keywords: scenery, so beautiful that, took breath away, especially, rainbow, appeared

children.text: We stayed in a comfortable hotel and hired a professional guide to show us around the historic square.
children.cn: 我们住在一间舒适的旅馆里，并雇用了一位专业导游带我们参观具有历史意义的广场。
children.notes: stayed: 居住（stay的过去式）; hired: 雇用（hire的过去式）; professional guide: 专业导游; historic square: 历史广场
children.statement: “hired” 在这里相当于 “took”，意为“雇用”或“聘请”。
children.explanation: hire 表示付钱雇用或租用，在这里表示聘请一位专业导游。
children.keywords: stayed, comfortable, hired, professional guide, historic square

children.text: There, we saw thousands of ancient artworks and took many photos.
children.cn: 在那里，我们看到了成千上万的古代艺术品并拍了许多照片。
children.notes: There: 在那里; thousands of: 数以千计的; ancient artworks: 古代艺术品; took many photos: 拍了许多照片
children.statement: “artworks” 意为“艺术品”，是可数名词复数形式。
children.explanation: artwork 是可数名词，复数形式在词尾直接加 -s，变为 artworks。
children.keywords: There, saw, thousands of, artworks, took photos

children.text: Feelings & Meaning
children.cn: 感受与意义

children.text: I was not bored at all because we enjoyed ourselves every day.
children.cn: 我一点也不觉得无聊，因为我们每天都过得很开心。
children.notes: not... at all: 一点也不; because: 因为，引导原因状语从句; enjoyed ourselves: 玩得开心，过得愉快
children.statement: “enjoy oneself” 是固定搭配，意为“玩得开心”，相当于 “have a good time”。
children.explanation: enjoy oneself 中的反身代词要与主语保持一致，如 We enjoyed ourselves，意为过得愉快、玩得高兴。
children.keywords: not bored at all, because, enjoyed ourselves, every day

children.text: The trip not only relaxed me but also reminded me of the value of history.
children.cn: 这次旅行不仅让我放松，也提醒了我历史的价值。
children.notes: not only... but also...: 不仅……而且……; relaxed: 放松，休息; value of history: 历史的价值
children.statement: “not only... but also...” 连接了两个并列的谓语动词 “relaxed” 和 “reminded”。
children.explanation: 在该句中，not only... but also... 用于并列两个过去的动作，以表达递进关系。
children.keywords: trip, not only, relaxed, but also, reminded, value of history

children.text: I will probably visit it again because I can never forget this journey.
children.cn: 我很可能会再次访问它，因为我永远无法忘记这次旅程。
children.notes: probably: 很可能; visit it again: 再次拜访/参观它; never forget: 永远不忘记; journey: 旅行，旅程
children.statement: “probably” 是一个形容词，用来表示可能。
children.explanation: “probably” 是副词，意为“很可能地，大概”。其对应的形容词是 “probable”。
children.keywords: probably, visit again, because, never forget, journey
